records.question: Who is the teacher named Anne Walker who is exactly 41 years old and has course arrangements?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT teacher.teacher_id FROM teacher
JOIN course_arrange ON teacher.teacher_id = course_arrange.teacher_id
WHERE teacher.age = '41' AND teacher.name = 'Anne Walker'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Teacher_ID FROM teacher AS T1 WHERE T1.Name = 'Anne Walker' AND T1.Age = '41' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM course_arrange AS T2 WHERE T2.Teacher_ID = T1.Teacher_ID)

records.question: Who is the teacher named Anne Walker from Little Lever Urban District who is exactly 41 years old?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT teacher.teacher_id FROM teacher
WHERE teacher.hometown = 'Little Lever Urban District' AND teacher.name = 'Anne Walker' AND teacher.age = '41'
records.pred_sql: SELECT Teacher_ID FROM teacher WHERE Name = 'Anne Walker' AND Hometown = 'Little Lever Urban District' AND Age = '41'

records.question: Who is Anne Walker from Little Lever Urban District, aged 41, teaching students in grade 7 or higher?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT teacher.teacher_id FROM teacher
JOIN course_arrange ON teacher.teacher_id = course_arrange.teacher_id
WHERE teacher.age = '41' AND course_arrange.grade >= 7 AND teacher.hometown = 'Little Lever Urban District' AND teacher.name = 'Anne Walker'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Teacher_ID FROM teacher AS T1 INNER JOIN course_arrange AS T2 ON T1.Teacher_ID = T2.Teacher_ID WHERE T1.Name = 'Anne Walker' AND T1.Hometown = 'Little Lever Urban District' AND T1.Age = '41' AND T2.Grade >= 7

records.question: Which teachers named Anne Walker, aged 41 and from Little Lever Urban District, teach grades 7 or higher?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT teacher.teacher_id FROM teacher
JOIN course_arrange ON teacher.teacher_id = course_arrange.teacher_id
WHERE teacher.name = 'Anne Walker' AND teacher.hometown = 'Little Lever Urban District' AND course_arrange.grade >= 7 AND teacher.age = '41'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Teacher_ID FROM teacher AS T1 INNER JOIN course_arrange AS T2 ON T1.Teacher_ID = T2.Teacher_ID WHERE T1.Name = 'Anne Walker' AND T1.Age = '41' AND T1.Hometown = 'Little Lever Urban District' AND T2.Grade >= 7

records.question: Which teachers who are exactly 26 years old have courses assigned to them?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT teacher.teacher_id FROM teacher
JOIN course_arrange ON teacher.teacher_id = course_arrange.teacher_id
JOIN course ON course_arrange.course_id = course.course_id
WHERE teacher.age = '26'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Teacher_ID FROM teacher AS T1 JOIN course_arrange AS T2 ON T1.Teacher_ID = T2.Teacher_ID WHERE T1.Age = '26'

records.question: Which teachers named Lucy Wong, aged 39 and from Turton Urban District, teach Music courses at grade 4 or below?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT teacher.teacher_id FROM teacher
JOIN course_arrange ON teacher.teacher_id = course_arrange.teacher_id
JOIN course ON course_arrange.course_id = course.course_id
WHERE course.course = 'Music' AND course_arrange.grade <= 4 AND teacher.name = 'Lucy Wong' AND teacher.hometown = 'Turton Urban District' AND teacher.age = '39'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Teacher_ID FROM teacher AS T1 INNER JOIN course_arrange AS T2 ON T1.Teacher_ID = T2.Teacher_ID INNER JOIN course AS T3 ON T2.Course_ID = T3.Course_ID WHERE T1.Name = 'Lucy Wong' AND T1.Age = '39' AND T1.Hometown = 'Turton Urban District' AND T3.Course = 'Music' AND T2.Grade <= 4
